text.title: growth-tiktok-strategies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-tiktok-strategies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents generate hooks that are grammatically correct but tonally flat — TikTok hooks need urgency and pattern interruption, which requires explicit prompting ("write this hook as if the viewer is about to scroll away").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default tone is neutral; TikTok's medium demands attention-grabbing urgency.

failure-mode.description: Series content drafted by agents often lacks a genuine cliffhanger — the "reveal" in Part 2 must be compelling enough to justify a follow; validate manually before posting Part 1.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents tend to generate logical conclusions rather than psychological hooks.

failure-mode.description: Watch-time analysis requires actual data; agents asked to "predict" drop-off points without data will hallucinate statistics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Only real analytics reveal drop-off patterns; predictions without data are fabrications.

failure-mode.description: Trend adaptation scripts sound generic unless the trend's exact sound, text overlay style, and visual pattern are described in detail to the agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents need concrete reference material, not abstract trend names.

failure-mode.description: Do not ask an agent to select which hashtags to use — TikTok hashtag strategy is real-time and requires Creative Center access; use 3-5 niche hashtags chosen by a human.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Real-time trend data is outside agent training scope.
